HomePage.title: Frontend Engineer focused on polished, performant interfaces.
HomePage.description: An early multi-page portfolio foundation for recruiters, founders, and freelance clients. Professional mode is the default, with playful mode as an alternate experience.
HomePage.overviewDescription: Milestone 1 prepares routing, i18n, base layout, and visual mode foundations before database, CMS, and full content pages.
